notes: native
title: Sid Meier’s Civilization® VI

cpu: AMD Ryzen 5 2400G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes: As it kept crashing on linux I tried with proton. Started and was asked to chose between DX11 and DX12 (took DX11) but after that it crashed.
title: Sid Meier’s Civilization® VI

notes: To run natively in Arch Linux, I had to install lib32-openssl-1.0 and run the game with this command: LD_PRELOAD=/usr/lib/libfreetype.so.6 LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/usr/lib/openssl-1.0 %command%
title: Sid Meier’s Civilization® VI

notes: Launch screen appears, but after clicking Play with DirectX 11 selected, a black full-screen window appears along with an error message saying graphics configuration failed, and then exits out. This may have something to do with only having an Intel integrated GPU
title: Sid Meier’s Civilization® VI

notes: crash after start
title: Sid Meier’s Civilization® VI

notes: Adding "LD_PRELOAD=/usr/lib/libfreetype.so.6 LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/usr/lib/openssl-1.0 %command%" to Steam's launch options lets the game start.
title: Sid Meier’s Civilization® VI

notes: "Native" version is not compatible. Re-installed under Proton. Firaxis launch screen loaded but game crashed immediately after clicking 'play.'
title: Sid Meier’s Civilization® VI

notes: Only a black screen and a crash.
title: Sid Meier’s Civilization® VI

notes: Running on FHD, played for about an hour on ultra settings and everything seems to be working fine out of the box with the latest Ubuntu LTS release. I recommend installing the game in an SSD as i experienced unusual low FPS and abnormally long loading times  when i tested it on my average HDD (I used to run it fine, on the same HDD in Windows 10, without any low FPS or such long loading times). Overall, it runs smoothly out of the box.
title: Sid Meier’s Civilization® VI

notes: Only a grey screen with DXVK on Proton, then nothing happens.
title: Sid Meier’s Civilization® VI

notes:
The new Aspyr-Launcher works quite fine but only for the base game. 

Problem is, the huge workshop section is not working for Linux. There is no guarantee, that any MOD will run on Linux. Testing and re-starting the whole game for every single MOD you add is a nightmare. 

More harming is, that DLC doesn't have native support for Linux too. If you try to start a game with DLC (Rise & Fall 2019 in my case), you can't choose any settings in the menu any longer and game freezes in that view. 

Linux support by Aspyr took ~1 year after release to come, each DLC may need the same time to get a workaround.
title: Sid Meier’s Civilization® VI

notes: Only a grey screen with DXVK on Proton, then nothing happens.
title: Sid Meier’s Civilization® VI

notes:
Runs perfectly with following start option: LD_PRELOAD=/usr/lib/libfreetype.so.6 LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/usr/lib/openssl-1.0 %command%
No perfomance, graphic or network/multiplayer issues :)
title: Sid Meier’s Civilization® VI

notes: Borked: just grey screen and firaxis crash dialogue in the background. All of the success stories for this game, are running natively and not using proton. There are many strong reasons for wanting to play this title under proton: game mods not working natively and native running at 20% performance compared to win10 in a VM are two of the strong ones.
title: Sid Meier’s Civilization® VI

notes: Only a grey screen with DXVK on Proton, then nothing happens. The Linux native version doesn't work without adding LD_PRELOAD=/usr/lib/libfreetype.so.6 LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/usr/lib/openssl-1.0 to the start parameters, but then it worked fine.
title: Sid Meier’s Civilization® VI

notes: Worked perfectly after setting launch options to " LD_PRELOAD=/usr/lib/libfreetype.so.6 LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/usr/lib/openssl-1.0 %command%"
title: Sid Meier’s Civilization® VI

notes: Launcher runs and seems to function fine. Game will refuse to run in DX11 mode due to an unsupported graphics card / driver. DX12 mode will silently exit the program. Unusable with proton in this hardware configuration.
title: Sid Meier’s Civilization® VI

notes: Launcher display is way large and unresizable but it's working fine, clicked play and everything works out well. There are some moments when I launch the game and the resolution is off but is easily fixed by switching to windowed then to fullscreen.
title: Sid Meier’s Civilization® VI

notes: Hard lockup using DX 11. After the intro video, the screen stays grey and it must be terminated from the TTY.
title: Sid Meier’s Civilization® VI

notes:
You must add the line....

LD_PRELOAD=/usr/lib/libfreetype.so.6 LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/usr/lib/openssl-1.0 %command%

In "Set Launch Options" for this to work on an ATI Radeon graphic card to work on Pop!_OS 19.04 x86_64
title: Sid Meier’s Civilization® VI
